pillars.heading: Curriculum Design
pillars.body: Designing rigorous, contextually grounded learning experiences across schools, nonprofits, and ed-tech — from English textbooks to media literacy curricula to teacher training frameworks.

pillars.heading: Research & Analysis
pillars.body: Qualitative research and literature synthesis at the intersection of gender, equity, and schooling systems, with a focus on the hidden curricula that shape students' lives.

pillars.heading: Teacher Learning
pillars.body: Coaching and training educators to reflect critically on their pedagogy, the power dynamics in their classrooms, and the systems that constrain and enable their students.

ctaBody: I'm always interested in thoughtful collaborations in education, curriculum, and public scholarship.
